title: DenominationSet
description: A versioned, currency-specific collection of bill and coin denominations delivered to every kiosk from the fleet config endpoint. All kiosks consuming the same set are guaranteed identical denomination logic.

spec_version.description: Monotonically increasing version string for this denomination set. Kiosks MUST reject a downgrade (lower version than currently loaded). Format: YYYY-MM-DD.N

fiat_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code this denomination set applies to.

bills.description: Ordered list of bill denominations, from lowest to highest value.

coins.description: Ordered list of coin denominations, from lowest to highest value.
